violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. PIC ordered at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The fans in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of dust and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
